steps: Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 1.5 g NaNO 3 Sodium nitrate P212121
Add 0.04 g K 2 HPO 4 Potassium phosphate (dibasic) P212121
Add 0.075 g MgSO 4 *7H 2 O Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users
Add 0.036 g CaCl 2 *2H 2 O Calcium carbonate P212121
Add 0.006 g Citric acid Citric Acid P212121
Add 0.006 g Ferric ammonium citrate ammonium ferric sulfate Contributed by users
Add 0.001 g EDTA (disodium salt) EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
Add 0.02 g Na 2 CO 3 Sodium carbonate P212121
Add 1 mL Trace metal mix A5 BG-11 Trace metal mix A5 by Steven W Wilhelm
If making agar, add 10 g to media.
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
